scripts.build: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://vinext-pages-router.localhost -o dist/vinext-pages-router.wasm
scripts.build:debug: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -d -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://vinext-pages-router.localhost -o dist/vinext-pages-router.wasm
